Week 6 is live: Week 6 Pre-Draw Edition

Pre-draw edition for 4-10 May 2026 . Week 6 keeps the ATP clay swing in focus, and the best fantasy approach is still to stay flexible until the bracket is official. The early edge is to identify likely premium anchors, track workload after the recent clay stretch, and flag ranking-based pricing gaps that could matter once the official draw lands and the slate sharpens.

Bonus Ball board: Jannik Sinner, Carlos Alcaraz, Alexander Zverev.
